title: dupatya pusilla
intro: Dupatya pusilla, also known as Indian gentian or Gentiana andrewsii, is a plant species native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dupatya pusilla include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in the form of tinctures and extracts, to harness its medicinal properties.
